name: toolbar
title: mcut Toolbar + Transport
description: Slim editor toolbar (history, project name, export) and the CapCut-style transport bar (frame stepping, aspect presets, snap magnet, fullscreen).

files.content:
export {
  addTextAtPlayhead,
  allElementIds,
  clipEdges,
  duplicateElement,
  duplicateSelection,
  elementForAsset,
  elementForTextPreset,
  insertElementAtPlayhead,
  insertElementOnNewTrack,
  insertElementOnTrack,
  isSoloTrack,
  removeSelection,
  selectTrackElements,
  shuttle,
  splitAllAtPlayhead,
  splitSelectionAtPlayhead,
  TEXT_PRESETS,
  toggleMasterKeyframe,
  toggleSoloTrack,
  trackOfSelection,
  trimSelectionToPlayhead,
  unlinkElements,
  type TextPreset,
} from "@mcut/editor";

&, & [data-slot=\"scroll-area-viewport\".mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-t) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem))), linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-b) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem)))
&, & [data-slot=\"scroll-area-viewport\".animation: scroll-mask-reveal-t linear both, scroll-mask-conceal-b linear both

&, & [data-slot=\"scroll-area-viewport\".mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-l) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem))), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-r) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem)))
&, & [data-slot=\"scroll-area-viewport\".animation: scroll-mask-reveal-l linear both, scroll-mask-conceal-r linear both

&, & [data-slot=\"scroll-area-viewport\".mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-t) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem)))
linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-b) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem)))
linear-gradient(to right, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-l) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem)))
linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black calc(var(--scroll-mask-r) * var(--scroll-mask-size, 1.5rem)))
